title: rubus × euchroanthus
intro: Rubus × euchroanthus, also known as the hybrid raspberry or Japanese hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the Asian species Rubus ellipticus and the European species Rubus fruticosus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of salicylic acid, which has anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. The health benefits of Rubus × euchroanthus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe digestive issues. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
